info.title: ImagePipeline
info.description:
**ImagePipeline** is an identity generation API for developers and product teams.

Generate, preserve, swap, and animate real people using open-source models.
All endpoints are independent primitives that compose freely into full content workflows.

---

### Authentication

Every request requires an `X-API-Key` header:

```
X-API-Key: <your_api_key>
```

Get your key from the [dashboard](https://imagepipeline.io/dashboard).

---

### How jobs work

All compute endpoints are **asynchronous**, they return immediately with a `job_id`
and `status: queued`. Retrieve the result in one of two ways:

| Method | How |
|---|---|
| **Poll** | `GET /{endpoint}/status/{job_id}` until `status` is `completed` or `failed` |
| **Webhook** | Pass `callback_url` in the request body, we POST a `WebhookEvent` on completion |

Recommended: use webhooks for production, polling for development.

---

### Result URL lifecycle

> ⚠️ **Result URLs expire within 24 hours.**
>
> `result_url` is a temporary pre-signed download link.
> Download and store the file in your own storage immediately after the job completes.
> Do not persist the URL itself, it will stop working.

---

### Composable workflows

Every endpoint is an independent primitive. Chain them in any order:

| Workflow | Steps |
|---|---|
| **Identity** | Generate → Lock → Try-on → Animate |
| **Content** | Generate → Faceswap → Background → Upscale |
| **Brand** | Generate → Background → Branding → Upscale |

---

### Request format

All request bodies are **flat JSON**, no nested `payload` wrapper:

```json
{
  "prompt": "a person in a red jacket on a rooftop",
  "height": 1024,
  "width": 1024,
  "output_format": "webp",
  "callback_url": "https://yourserver.com/webhook"
}
```

---

### Compliance

All outputs include embedded **C2PA provenance metadata** satisfying
EU AI Act Article 50 (AI-generated content disclosure).
ImagePipeline processes media ephemerally, we are a data processor,
not a data controller. Your inputs and outputs are never stored long-term.
info.x-result-url-notice: Result URLs returned by this API are temporary pre-signed download links. They expire shortly after the job completes. Download and persist the file in your own storage before the TTL elapses.

post.description:
Create a named identity profile that stores an adapter config snapshot and an optional pointer to your own S3 bucket.

**Zero data retention:** ImagePipeline never stores face images. The S3 config is a pointer to *your* bucket, we never access it. Your encryption key is never sent to or stored by this API.

Once created, pass `profile_id` in any identity endpoint request (`/identity/lock`, `/identity/faceswap`, `/creator/tryon`, etc.) to apply this profile's config automatically.

get.description: Return all identity profiles for the authenticated user, newest first.
Fetch a single identity profile by ID.

patch.description: Partially update a profile. Only fields included in the request body are changed. Adapter config fields (prompt_template, steps, cfg_scale, etc.) are merged, omitted fields keep their existing values.

delete.description: Delete an identity profile. This removes the profile record and its adapter config snapshot. It does NOT delete anything from your S3 bucket, your reference images remain under your control.

post.description:
Swap faces in images with photorealistic results

High-quality face replacement using InSwapper + GFPGAN technology.
Preserves facial expressions, lighting conditions, and natural skin tones
for seamless blending.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- High-quality face swapping with InSwapper 128
- GFPGAN face restoration
- Configurable upscaling and restoration strength
- Natural blending and seamless results

get.description:
Check status of face swap job

Returns the current status and progress of a face swap job.
Only the user who created the job can check its status.

post.description:
Lock facial identity in image generation

Preserve and lock a specific facial identity across image variations and edits.
Ensures consistent face representation in generated content.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Facial identity preservation
- Consistent face generation
- Identity-aware image editing
- Cross-variation face consistency

get.description:
Check status of identity lock job

Returns the current status and progress of an identity lock job.
Only the user who created the job can check its status.

post.description:
Replace facial identity in images

Seamlessly replace one facial identity with another in existing images.
Perfect for creative content, product demonstrations, and privacy protection.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Facial identity replacement
- Natural face blending
- Expression preservation
- High-quality face swapping

get.description:
Check status of identity replace job

Returns the current status and progress of an identity replace job.
Only the user who created the job can check its status.

post.description:
Generate consistent AI models for creator content

Create photorealistic AI models with consistent facial features for use in
influencer content, ads, and product demonstrations. Perfect for building
a consistent brand identity with AI-generated models.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Consistent face generation across multiple images
- Photorealistic AI models
- Face identity preservation
- Professional quality outputs

get.description:
Check status of instamodel generation job

Returns the current status and progress of an instamodel generation job.
Only the user who created the job can check its status.

post.description:
Create realistic virtual try-on experiences

Place clothing, accessories, and fashion items naturally on models or real people.
AI ensures natural fitting, realistic textures, and proper draping for lifelike results.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Virtual clothing try-on
- Natural fitting and draping
- Realistic texture rendering
- Lifelike results
Clone a voice and generate speech in that voice.

Generate high-quality images from text descriptions

Create stunning images using advanced AI. Supports detailed prompts,
negative prompts, and customizable dimensions for professional results.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue  
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Text-to-image generation
- Customizable dimensions and quality
- Advanced prompt engineering support
- Negative prompt support

get.description: Check the current status of an image generation job. Poll this endpoint or use callback_url for webhook delivery.

post.description:
Generate animated videos from images or text

Transform static images into dynamic video content or create videos directly from
text descriptions. Perfect for social media, ads, and product demonstrations.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Image-to-video generation
- Text-to-video generation  
- Customizable video dimensions and duration
- Motion control and guidance

get.description:
Check status of video generation job (Redis final state)

Returns the persistent job state from Redis. For real-time updates,
use WebSocket connection: ws://api/ws/job/{job_id}

This endpoint is optimized for simple status checks, not real-time monitoring.

post.description:
Generate natural-sounding speech from text

Convert text into high-quality audio speech with support for multiple languages
and customizable voice parameters.

**Plan-based routing:**
- All plans supported → Dedicated processing queues

**Features:**
- High-quality text-to-speech synthesis
- Multiple language support
- Voice cloning capabilities
- Customizable speech parameters

get.description:
Check status of speech generation job (Redis final state)

Returns the persistent job state from Redis. For real-time updates,
use WebSocket connection: ws://api/ws/job/{job_id}

This endpoint is optimized for simple status checks, not real-time monitoring.

post.description:
Generate 3D models from images

Transform 2D images into high-quality 3D meshes with optional texture painting.
Perfect for creating 3D assets and product visualization.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Image-to-3D mesh generation
- Automatic texture painting
- Multiple export formats
- High-quality geometry

get.description:
Check status of 3D generation job

Returns the current status and progress of a 3D model generation job.
Only the user who created the job can check its status.

post.description:
Edit and enhance images with AI

Comprehensive image editing capabilities including enhancement, object manipulation,
style transfer, background replacement, and image restoration.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- AI-powered image enhancement
- Object removal and addition
- Style transfer and artistic effects
- Background replacement
- Image upscaling and restoration

get.description:
Check status of image editing job

Returns the current status and progress of an image editing job.
Only the user who created the job can check its status.

post.description:
Replace image backgrounds intelligently

Seamlessly replaces backgrounds while perfectly preserving your main subject.
Maintains natural lighting, shadows, and edge details for professional-quality results.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Intelligent background replacement
- Subject preservation
- Natural lighting and shadows
- Edge detail retention

Generate a branded image and optionally stamp your company logo

Produces a branded image from a text prompt using AI generation (QwenImage).
If `payload.logo_url` is provided, your company logo is automatically stamped
in the bottom-right corner at 50% opacity using Pillow, no GPU required.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

get.description: Get branding logo generation job status

post.description:
Generate branded templates and designs

Create professional branding templates, social media graphics, and marketing materials
with AI-powered design generation.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- Branded template generation
- Social media graphics
- Marketing material creation
- Brand color palette support
- Consistent brand styling

get.description:
Check status of branding template generation job

Returns the current status and progress of a template generation job.
Only the user who created the job can check its status.

post.description:
Upscale and enhance image quality

Increases image resolution while enhancing quality and preserving fine details.
Advanced AI ensures sharp, professional results suitable for print and high-resolution displays.

**Plan-based routing:**
- BASIC plan → Standard processing queue
- PRO plan → Priority processing queue
- Enterprise plans → Dedicated high-performance queues

**Features:**
- AI-powered upscaling
- Quality enhancement
- Detail preservation
- Multiple resolution options

get.description:
Returns an example `WebhookEvent` payload, the exact JSON object we POST to your `callback_url` when a job completes or fails.

Use this endpoint to inspect the schema interactively. Refer to the `WebhookEvent` model in the Schemas section below for full field descriptions.

intent_id.title: Intent Id
intent_id.description: Intent this profile is optimised for.

prompt_template.title: Prompt Template
prompt_template.description: Jinja2 prompt template. {{user_prompt}} is always available.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Fixed seed for reproducible outputs. Omit or set to None for a random seed each job.

seed_strategy.title: Seed Strategy
seed_strategy.description: 'random', new seed each job; 'fixed', always use fixed_seed; 'user', honour per-request seed if provided.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand color palette as hex codes. Applied to every job using this profile.

height.title: Height
height.description: Default output image height in pixels.

width.title: Width
width.description: Default output image width in pixels.

output_format.title: Output Format
output_format.description: Default output format: 'webp', 'jpeg', or 'png'. Use 'png' for editing chains; 'webp' for app delivery.

prompt_template_mode.title: Prompt Template Mode
prompt_template_mode.description: How to combine the profile's prompt_template with the caller's prompt. 'suffix' (default) appends the template after; 'prefix' prepends it before.

AdapterConfigSnapshot.title: AdapterConfigSnapshot
AdapterConfigSnapshot.description:
Frozen copy of the adapter config active when the profile was created or
last updated. Stored alongside the profile so jobs are reproducible even
if the system default adapter config changes.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Text description of the branded image to generate.

logo_url.title: Logo Url
logo_url.description: Public URL of your company logo (PNG or WebP with transparency recommended). Stamped at bottom-right corner at 50% opacity.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes (e.g. `['#FF5733', '#3498DB']`). Blended into the output.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

BrandingLogoRequest.title: BrandingLogoRequest
BrandingLogoRequest.description: Generate a branded image and optionally stamp your company logo.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Describe the branded asset to generate. You can include hex colour codes directly (e.g. 'use #FF5733 for the background').

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes (e.g. `['#FF5733', '#3498DB']`). Colours will be incorporated into the design.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

BrandingTemplateRequest.title: BrandingTemplateRequest
BrandingTemplateRequest.description: Generate a branded image template with your colour palette and style.

target.title: Target
target.description: Public URL of the target image (the body/scene where the face will appear).

source.title: Source
source.description: Public URL of the source face image (the face to swap in).

restore_weight.title: Restore Weight
restore_weight.description: Face restoration strength (0.0–1.0). Higher = sharper face detail.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes. Blended into the output.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Identity profile ID from `/identity/profiles/v1`. When provided, the profile's settings are applied automatically.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

FaceswapRequest.title: FaceswapRequest
FaceswapRequest.description: Swap a face from one image onto another.

FailureReasonCode.title: FailureReasonCode
FailureReasonCode.description: Stable machine-readable failure codes returned in ``failure_reason_code``.

image_path.title: Image Path
image_path.description: Public URL or path of the input image to convert to 3D.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Generation mode: `generate` (mesh only), `paint` (texture an existing mesh), or `generate_and_paint` (mesh + textures in one pass).

mesh_save_name.title: Mesh Save Name
mesh_save_name.description: Optional filename for the output mesh (e.g. `model.obj`).

painted_save_name.title: Painted Save Name
painted_save_name.description: Optional filename for the textured/painted mesh.

auto_unload.title: Auto Unload
auto_unload.description: Unload the generation pipeline from GPU after completion to free memory.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

Generate3DRequest.title: Generate3DRequest
Generate3DRequest.description: Convert a 2D image into a 3D mesh (with optional texturing).

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate.

guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale
guidance_scale.description: Guidance scale. Omit to use the model default (0.0 for Z-Image Turbo).

logo_url.title: Logo Url
logo_url.description: Public URL of your company logo (PNG or WebP with transparency recommended). Stamped at bottom-right at 50% opacity.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes (e.g. `['#FF5733', '#3498DB']`). Blended into the output.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Identity profile ID from `/profiles/v1`. When provided, the profile's prompt_template, quality settings, and brand palette are applied automatically, keeping theme and brand context consistent across a generation chain.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

GenerateRequest.title: GenerateRequest
GenerateRequest.description: Generate a high-quality image from a text prompt.

input_image.title: Input Image
input_image.description: Public URL of the image to animate.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Describe the animation style or motion. Defaults to cinematic motion.
prompt.default: make this image come alive, cinematic motion, smooth animation

height.title: Height
height.description: Output height in pixels (max 1536, must be divisible by 32).

width.title: Width
width.description: Output width in pixels (max 1536, must be divisible by 32).

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to this job.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

GenerateVideoRequest.title: GenerateVideoRequest
GenerateVideoRequest.description: Animate a still image into a short video clip.

input_image.title: Input Image
input_image.description: Public URL of the source image whose identity will be locked and preserved.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Describe the desired scene or appearance changes. The person's identity is automatically preserved throughout.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes. Blended into the output.

negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt. Activates classifier-free guidance when set.

num_inference_steps.title: Num Inference Steps
num_inference_steps.description: Number of diffusion steps (1–100). Higher = better quality but slower. Default: 8.

guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale
guidance_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale (1.0–20.0). Higher = follows prompt more strictly. Default: 1.5.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Identity profile ID from `/identity/profiles/v1`. When provided, the profile's settings override manual generation params.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

IdentityLockRequest.title: IdentityLockRequest
IdentityLockRequest.description: Preserve and lock a person's identity while editing their scene or appearance.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for this profile, e.g. 'Anna, summer campaign'.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional notes about this identity profile.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Default webhook URL for job completion events from this profile. Overridable per-request.

intent_id.title: Intent Id
intent_id.description: Optimise this profile for a specific intent, e.g. 'identity_lock'.

prompt_template.title: Prompt Template
prompt_template.description: Custom Jinja2 prompt template for this profile. Use {{user_prompt}} to inject the caller's prompt. Example: 'Portrait of Anna, {{user_prompt}}, consistent lighting'.

negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt applied to every job using this profile.

seed_strategy.title: Seed Strategy
seed_strategy.description: 'random', new seed per job; 'fixed', always use fixed_seed; 'user', honour per-request seed if provided.

fixed_seed.title: Fixed Seed
fixed_seed.description: Seed to use when seed_strategy='fixed'. Ignored for other strategies.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand color palette as hex codes applied to all jobs from this profile (e.g. ['#FF5733', '#3498DB']).

output_format.title: Output Format
output_format.description: Default output format: 'webp', 'jpeg', or 'png'. Use 'png' for editing chains; 'webp' for final app delivery.

prompt_template_mode.title: Prompt Template Mode
prompt_template_mode.description: How to combine the profile's prompt_template with the caller's prompt. 'suffix' (default) appends the template after the user prompt; 'prefix' prepends it before.

extra_params.title: Extra Params
extra_params.description: Additional model-specific parameters passed through to the worker.

job_count.title: Job Count
job_count.description: Total jobs run using this profile.

IdentityProfileUpdate.title: IdentityProfileUpdate
IdentityProfileUpdate.description: Request body for PATCH /profiles/v1/{profile_id}, all fields optional.

input_image.title: Input Image
input_image.description: Public URL of the image whose identity will be replaced.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Describe the new identity or scene context.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes. Blended into the output.

negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt. Activates classifier-free guidance when set.

num_inference_steps.title: Num Inference Steps
num_inference_steps.description: Number of diffusion steps (1–100). Higher = better quality but slower. Default: 20.

guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale
guidance_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale (1.0–20.0). Higher = follows prompt more strictly. Default: 3.5.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Identity profile ID from `/profiles/v1`. When provided, the profile's settings are applied automatically.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (~24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

IdentityReplaceRequest.title: IdentityReplaceRequest
IdentityReplaceRequest.description: Replace the identity/face in an image with a prompted new identity.

input_image.title: Input Image
input_image.description: Image(s) to edit. Pass a single URL string, or an array of URL strings to provide multiple reference images (e.g. two subjects to combine).

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Instruction describing the edits to apply.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Processing mode. Use `anime` to convert a photo to an illustrated/anime style.

height.title: Height
height.description: Output height in pixels (max 2048). Omit to use the input image's native height.

width.title: Width
width.description: Output width in pixels (max 2048). Omit to use the input image's native width.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes (e.g. `['#FF5733']`). Blended into the output.

num_inference_steps.title: Num Inference Steps
num_inference_steps.description: Number of diffusion steps (1–100). Higher = better quality but slower. Default: 8.

guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale
guidance_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale (0.0–20.0). Set to 0 to disable CFG (distilled/Lightning models). Default: 1.5.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Identity profile ID from `/profiles/v1`. When provided, the profile's prompt_template, quality settings, and brand palette are applied automatically, keeping theme and brand context consistent across an editing chain.

refine_strength.title: Refine Strength
refine_strength.description: Z-Image Turbo refinement pass after editing (0.0–1.0). At 0.25–0.40, preserves composition from the edit step while improving skin photorealism and texture detail. Omit or set to 0 to skip the refinement pass.

faster_inference.title: Faster Inference
faster_inference.description: When `true` (default), uses the Lightning LoRA distillation for fast 8-step inference. Set to `false` for higher-quality 20-step inference without distillation, slower but preserves finer product and skin details.

cfg_norm_strength.title: Cfg Norm Strength
cfg_norm_strength.description: CFG normalization strength (0.0–1.0). Rescales the guided prediction to match the magnitude of the conditioned-only prediction, preventing colour saturation and tone shifts caused by high `true_cfg_scale`. Try 0.5–0.8 when colours look oversaturated. 0 (default) disables it.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

ImageEditingRequest.title: ImageEditingRequest
ImageEditingRequest.description: Edit or generate images using natural-language instructions.

ImageFormat.title: ImageFormat
ImageFormat.description: Output image format.  Applies to all image-producing endpoints.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Describe the scene, outfit, or style for the generated image.

input_face.title: Input Face
input_face.description: Public URL of the input face image.

negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt applied to the generation.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes. Blended into the output.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Identity profile ID from `/profiles/v1`. When provided, the profile's settings are applied automatically.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (~24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

InstaModelRequest.title: InstaModelRequest
InstaModelRequest.description: Generate a person image from a face photo and a text prompt.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current job status, typically `queued` immediately after submission.

estimated_time_seconds.title: Estimated Time Seconds
estimated_time_seconds.description: Estimated processing time in seconds. Indicative only.

queued_at.title: Queued At
queued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was queued.

JobQueuedResponse.title: JobQueuedResponse
JobQueuedResponse.description: Standard response returned by submit endpoints.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: API endpoint that created this job.

result_url.title: Result Url
result_url.description: **Temporary URL** to the generated output file. Pre-signed link that expires within 24 hours, download and store the file in your own storage before the TTL elapses. All outputs include embedded C2PA provenance metadata (EU AI Act Art. 50 compliant).

result_mime_type.title: Result Mime Type
result_mime_type.description: MIME type of the output, e.g. `image/webp`, `video/mp4`, `audio/wav`.

started_at.title: Started At
started_at.description: ISO 8601, worker picked up the job.

total_elapsed_seconds.title: Total Elapsed Seconds
total_elapsed_seconds.description: Total time from queue entry to completion (seconds).

queue_position.title: Queue Position
queue_position.description: Estimated position in queue at submit time.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the job failed.

failure_reason_code.description:
Stable machine-readable failure code. Use for programmatic error handling.

| Code | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | Too many requests, back off and retry |
| `CONCURRENT_JOBS_EXCEEDED` | Too many parallel jobs for your plan |
| `INSUFFICIENT_CREDITS` | Not enough credits, top up your balance |
| `CREDIT_CHARGE_FAILED` | Credits could not be deducted, contact support |
| `INPUT_INVALID` | Malformed URL, unreachable image, or invalid parameters |
| `MODEL_ERROR` | Inference pipeline error, retry or contact support |
| `STORAGE_ERROR` | Output could not be stored, retry |
| `TIMEOUT` | Job exceeded max processing time, retry |
| `MODEL_UNAVAILABLE` | Model temporarily offline, retry in a few minutes |
| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | Unexpected server error, contact support if persistent |
| `CANCELLED` | Job was cancelled |

retryable.title: Retryable
retryable.description: `true` if submitting the same request again may succeed.

warnings.title: Warnings
warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings or fallback notices generated during processing.

prompt_hash.title: Prompt Hash
prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the prompt. Use for deduplication or reproducing a result.

credits_charged.title: Credits Charged
credits_charged.description: `true` if credits were deducted for this job.

charged_at.title: Charged At
charged_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when credits were charged.

target_voice_path.title: Target Voice Path
target_voice_path.description: Public URL of a reference voice audio file for voice cloning (WAV/MP3, 5–30 s recommended). Required for `/identity/voice/clone`. If omitted on `/generate/speech`, a default voice is used.

apply_watermark.title: Apply Watermark
apply_watermark.description: Embed an inaudible audio watermark in the output (recommended for compliance).

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to this job.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

TextToSpeechRequest.title: TextToSpeechRequest
TextToSpeechRequest.description: Convert text to speech, optionally with voice cloning from a reference sample.

input_image.title: Input Image
input_image.description: Public URL of the image to upscale and enhance.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Brand colour palette as hex codes. Blended into the output.

num_inference_steps.title: Num Inference Steps
num_inference_steps.description: Number of diffusion steps (1–100). Higher = better quality but slower. Default: 10.

guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale
guidance_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale (1.0–20.0). Higher = follows prompt more strictly. Default: 1.5.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Identity profile ID from `/profiles/v1`. When provided, the profile's quality settings and brand palette are applied, ensuring the upscaled output stays consistent with the rest of the chain.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

UpscaleImageRequest.title: UpscaleImageRequest
UpscaleImageRequest.description: Enhance and upscale an image to higher resolution.

person_image.title: Person Image
person_image.description: Public URL of the person/model image (the body to dress).

clothing_image.title: Clothing Image
clothing_image.description: Public URL of the clothing or outfit image to place on the person.

gender.title: Gender
gender.description: Gender of the person (`man` or `woman`). Used to tune the try-on output.

negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt
negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt. Activates classifier-free guidance when set.

num_inference_steps.title: Num Inference Steps
num_inference_steps.description: Number of diffusion steps (1–100). Higher = better quality but slower. Default: 30.

guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale
guidance_scale.description: Classifier-free guidance scale (1.0–20.0). Higher = follows prompt more strictly. Default: 2.5.

profile_id.title: Profile Id
profile_id.description: Identity profile ID from `/profiles/v1`. When provided, the profile's settings are applied automatically.

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

VirtualTryonRequest.title: VirtualTryonRequest
VirtualTryonRequest.description: Dress a person in a new outfit using two reference images.

text.title: Text
text.description: Text to synthesise with the cloned voice.

reference_voice_url.title: Reference Voice Url
reference_voice_url.description: Public URL of the reference voice audio file for cloning (WAV or MP3, 5–30 s recommended).

apply_watermark.title: Apply Watermark
apply_watermark.description: Embed an inaudible audio watermark in the output (recommended for compliance).

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL. When the job completes or fails we POST a `WebhookEvent` object to this URL. See the **WebhookEvent** schema (Webhooks section) for the exact payload shape. `result_url` in the payload is temporary (∼24 h), download the file immediately.

server_id.title: Server Id
server_id.description: Enterprise: pod ID to pin this request to a specific dedicated pod.

VoiceCloneRequest.title: VoiceCloneRequest
VoiceCloneRequest.description: Clone a voice from a reference audio sample and synthesise new speech.

job_id.title: Job Id
job_id.description: Unique job identifier returned when the request was submitted.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: The user ID that submitted the job.

status.title: Status
status.description: Job outcome: `completed` if output was produced, `failed` if processing errored.

result_url.title: Result Url
result_url.description: Pre-signed URL to the generated output file. **Expires within 24 hours**, download and store the file immediately. Present when `status` is `completed`; `null` on failure.

result_base64.title: Result Base64
result_base64.description: Base64-encoded result file content. `null` unless base64 output was explicitly requested.

result_mime_type.title: Result Mime Type
result_mime_type.description: MIME type of the output file, e.g. `image/webp`, `video/mp4`, `audio/wav`.

result_size_bytes.title: Result Size Bytes
result_size_bytes.description: Size of the output file in bytes.

warnings.title: Warnings
warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings generated during processing, if any.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error description. Populated when `status` is `failed`; `null` on success.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) at which this event was emitted.

WebhookEvent.title: WebhookEvent
WebhookEvent.description:
JSON object POSTed to your ``callback_url`` when a job completes or fails.

Delivery behaviour
------------------
* We attempt delivery up to **3 times** with exponential back-off (1 s, 2 s).
* Your endpoint must return **HTTP 2xx within 10 seconds** to be considered
  successful; any other response (or a timeout) triggers a retry.
* No delivery guarantee after all retries are exhausted.

.. warning::
   ``result_url`` is a **temporary pre-signed URL** that expires within
   **24 hours** of generation.  Download and persist the file immediately
   upon receiving this event, do not store the URL itself.

tags.name: Identity
tags.description:
Core identity primitives: face swap, identity lock, identity replace, virtual try-on, voice cloning, and AI model generation.

All outputs embed C2PA provenance metadata (EU AI Act Art. 50 compliant).

**Typical flows:**
- `Generate → Lock → Try-on → Animate`
- `Faceswap → Background → Upscale`

tags.name: Generate
tags.description:
Text-to-image, image-to-video, text-to-speech, and image-to-3D generation.

Use standalone or as the first step in an identity or branding workflow.

**Typical flow:** `Generate → Identity Lock → Background → Upscale`

tags.name: Edit
tags.description:
Instruction-based image editing via natural language prompts.

Change scenes, swap objects, adjust lighting, or recompose an image without writing a single line of image processing code.

Supports a `mode` parameter for specialised editing, `anime` converts a photo to an illustrated style.

Pairs well with Identity endpoints: generate or lock an identity, then use Edit to place them in a new scene.

tags.name: Background
tags.description:
Background replacement and relighting. Works on any image, generated or uploaded.

Preserves the subject with natural lighting, shadows, and edge detail.

**Typical use:** Clean up an identity-generated image before adding branding or publishing.

tags.name: Branding
tags.description:
Logo generation and branded template creation.

Inject brand colours, style rules, and logo overlays into generated assets.

Designed to sit at the **end** of content workflows: `Identity → Background → Branding → Upscale`.

tags.name: Upscale
tags.description:
Resolution upscaling and detail enhancement.

Use as the **final step** in any workflow before delivery. Outputs are suitable for print and high-resolution display.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
Webhook delivery reference.

Pass `callback_url` in any request body to receive a `WebhookEvent` POST when the job completes or fails.

**Delivery behaviour:**
- Up to **3 attempts** with exponential back-off (1 s, 2 s)
- Your endpoint must return **HTTP 2xx within 10 seconds**
- No delivery guarantee after all retries are exhausted

> ⚠️ **`result_url` is temporary.** Pre-signed links expire within 24 hours. Download and store the output immediately upon receiving the webhook.

tags.name: User Management
tags.description: API key management, plan information, credit balance, and enterprise pod assignment.
